title: Bhagavad Gita, Chapter 4: The Yoga of Wisdom
description: Chapter 4 of the Bhagavad Gita: Krishna reveals that he incarnates whenever dharma declines, and teaches the path of knowledge.
introduction: Chapter 4 of the Bhagavad Gita: Krishna reveals that he incarnates whenever dharma declines, and teaches the path of knowledge.

translation.text: Whenever dharma declines and adharma prevails, I manifest myself. For the protection of the good and the destruction of evil, I come into being age after age.
